art_market.summary: Seoul's art market remains a vibrant hub in Asia in late March 2026. The Unknown Vibes 2026 Art Fair at Shilla Seoul and Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center are driving current attention.
new_exhibitions: Unknown Vibes 2026 Art Fair: The Bloom (Opened March 22, Shilla Seoul)
Spectrosynthesis Seoul (Opened March 20, Art Sonje Center)
Damien Hirst: Truth is False, Everything is Possible (MMCA Seoul)

stock_market.summary: As of March 23, 2026, KOSPI reflects cautious optimism. Markets are open for regular trading sessions. Focus remains on semiconductor strength and long-term outlook.

key_indicators.Key_Drivers: AI-driven memory super-cycle, semiconductor industry strength.
key_indicators.Outlook: Stable with potential for earnings momentum.
